---
title: "Publications"
---

## Preprints

1. **Karol Bolbotowski**, *Title of preprint*, arXiv:XXXX.XXXXX, 2026.  
   [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/) · [PDF](#)

## Journal articles

1. **Karol Bolbotowski**, Coauthor, *Title of article*, Journal Name, volume, pages, year.  
   [DOI](#) · [arXiv](#) · [PDF](#)

## Notes and expository writing

1. *Title of note*, year.  
   [PDF](#)

<!--
Later, you can automate this page from publications.bib.
For now, a manually curated list often looks cleaner and is easier to maintain.
-->
